## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`, `npm run lint`, and `npm test -- --passWithNoTests --ci` pass locally.
- [ ] If this PR updates **`docs/AUDIT_DRIFT_BASELINE.json`**, I ran `AUDIT_WRITE_BASELINE=1 npm run audit:coverage` after intentional critical-path or `supabase.from` layout changes and request **security review** of the baseline diff.
